task_completion.description: Access the metadata for the Turing paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem' is selected in the Zotero list, and its metadata is visible in the right-hand pane.

task_completion.description: Standardize the pages for the Turing paper to use a single hyphen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Pages' field in the right pane for the Turing paper is updated to exactly '230-265' (using a single hyphen, replacing the double hyphen '--').

task_completion.description: Access the metadata for the Shannon paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' is selected in the Zotero list, and its metadata is visible in the right-hand pane.

task_completion.description: Standardize the pages for the Shannon paper to use a single hyphen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Pages' field in the right pane for the Shannon paper is updated to exactly '379-423' (using a single hyphen, replacing the en-dash '–').

task_completion.description: Access the metadata for the He et al. paper.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paper 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' is selected in the Zotero list, and its metadata is visible in the right-hand pane.

task_completion.description: Standardize the pages for the He et al. paper to use a single hyphen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Pages' field in the right pane for the He et al. paper is updated to exactly '770-778' (using a single hyphen, replacing the double hyphen '--').

integrity.description: The agent used the Zotero graphical interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Zotero application window, clicking on items and editing text fields, rather than using terminal commands or scripts to modify the database.

integrity.description: The agent did not alter other metadata fields unnecessarily.
integrity.visual_evidence: Fields like Title, Author, and Date remain unchanged for the three target papers.

integrity.description: The agent actually edited the fields rather than just displaying the expected text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text cursor is visible in the 'Pages' field, or the field is highlighted during the editing process.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target 1: 'On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem' (Turing). Expected pages: '230-265'. Initial corruption: '230--265'.
Target 2: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon). Expected pages: '379-423'. Initial corruption: '379–423' (en-dash).
Target 3: 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al.). Expected pages: '770-778'. Initial corruption: '770--778'.
